$comment: Named, versioned machine-verification suite for cinatra-ai/cinatra — the gate-arm half of the truthful verification-record model (ratified spec cinatra-engineering#119 §4). The truthful-attribution-gate reads THIS file at the merged SHA (authoritative, no TOCTOU) when a merge record carries a Gate-suite arm: the cited suiteId@version must equal this file's, the Accountable trailer must equal accountable{github,name,email}, and every requiredContexts entry must have concluded success on the reviewed head. highRiskPaths EXTENDS the central cinatra-ai/ci defaults (the gate verifies the effective set is a superset). High-risk changes (this file is itself one — see **/gate-suite.json in the defaults) require the HUMAN arm at tier=maintainer; the gate arm alone is rejected, so this file's birth carries a maintainer Reviewed-by, not a self-blessing gate arm. lastAuditedAt + auditEvidence are the §4 monthly-audit record; the Accountable engineer re-audits monthly and bumps BOTH coupled in one commit (the gate warns >35d, fails the gate arm >65d; the human arm is always still available).
auditEvidence: 2026-06-13 re-pin: truthful-attribution-gate context moved to the fixed ci engine 8eede1022e835997d94974e4bd6205daf72131a2 (machine-arm reusable-workflow check-run resolution fix) and F1 caller-identity verification enabled via callerPath/allowedEvents — see this PR.
